name: פטרוזיליה
prompt:
E-commerce product photo of fresh flat-leaf parsley, shot on a pure white seamless paper background.

COMPOSITION: a bunch of flat-leaf parsley standing upright, stems gathered at the bottom, filling most of the frame — like a supermarket bunch. No dramatic shadow. No shadow pool. Very minimal contact shadow only.. Items fill 70-80% of the frame. Items are touching — not spread apart, not floating in empty space.

BACKGROUND: Pure white seamless paper. The background is #FFFFFF — identical to the page background on an e-commerce website. There is NO gray anywhere. No vignette. No gradient. No shadow on the background itself. The background is the same brightness top, bottom, left, and right.

LIGHTING: Flat, even, diffused light from above. Like a lightbox or overcast-sky light. No directional spotlight. No dramatic side-lighting. No hotspot highlights. The lighting is so even that there is almost no shadow at all.

SHADOW: The produce casts almost no shadow. At most a very thin, barely visible contact shadow directly under where the produce touches the ground — like the shadow in a Rami Levy or Shufersal product photo. The shadow does NOT spread out. It does NOT darken the background around the produce.

SURFACE: The produce has its natural dry skin. COMPLETELY DRY. NO water droplets anywhere on the surface. NO dew. NO condensation. NO moisture. NO wet shine. The skin texture is natural and slightly matte.

REALISM: This is a real photograph of real produce. Natural color variations and slight imperfections in shape and skin are correct and expected. This must NOT look like a 3D render, CGI, or digital illustration.

NO TEXT OR GRAPHICS: Zero text. Zero brand names. Zero stickers. Zero labels. Zero watermarks. Zero icons. Nothing printed or overlaid anywhere.

STRICTLY AVOID: water drops of any size, any gray in the background, vignette, drop shadow, dramatic shadows, spotlight, studio flash look, 3D render look, advertisement styling, macro photography, decorative props, oversaturation.

STYLE MATCH: This image should be visually identical in style to product photos on Shufersal.co.il or Rami-Levy.co.il — a clean, trustworthy, simple grocery catalog thumbnail.
